reason: The tweet contains extremist religious rhetoric and quotes a verse commonly used by ISIS to justify violence. It speaks about fighting until religion is for Allah alone, which is characteristic of ISIS propaganda messaging.
original_post: اننا نجاهد لتكون كلمة الله هي العليا وليكون الدين كله لله وَقَاتِلُوهُمْ حَتَّى لاَ تَكُونَ فِتْنَةٌ وَيَكُونَ الدِّينُ كُلُّهُ لِلّ
